nodes.label: Incremental Update (--update)
nodes.rationale: Re-extracts only new/changed files to save tokens; code-only changes skip semantic extraction entirely (no LLM needed). prune_sources is restricted to genuinely deleted files because build_merge's replace-on-re-extract already reconciles changed files (#1344, #1178).

nodes.label: build_merge Graph Merge
nodes.rationale: Reads graph.json directly without a NetworkX round-trip so edge direction is preserved (#801); root= relativizes prune paths so stale nodes are actually pruned (#1361); directed= must match the original build or reciprocal edges collapse (#1392).

nodes.label: Cluster-Only Rerun
nodes.rationale: Self-contained: re-clusters, names communities, and regenerates outputs from the existing graph. Steps 5-9 must not be re-run because their intermediate files were deleted by the prior build's cleanup (#1392).
